creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to lutz from comment #0)
> # pkg info xorg
> xorg-7.7_1
> Name           : xorg
> Version        : 7.7_1

This port is a meta-port and its version doesn't match the version of the X.Org server.

Could you please attach the output of "pkg info xorg-server" instead?
